creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
Also note your patch is both incorrect and incomplete.

1) You can't just delete the sample config file. What will you package?
With your patch, no config file will end up in package.

2) You don't handle the installation of the config file in port.

3) You don't handle the installation of the config file from package.

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

If God didn't mean for us to juggle, tennis balls wouldn't come three
to a can.
